testcase.name: testCharSeparator
testcase.failure: Traceback (most recent call last): File "C:\Users\mriga\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\Lib\unittest\case.py", line 57, in testPartExecutor yield File "C:\Users\mriga\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\Lib\unittest\case.py", line 619, in run self._callSetUp() File "C:\Users\mriga\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\Lib\unittest\case.py", line 576, in _callSetUp self.setUp() File "C:\Users\mriga\OneDrive\Desktop\commons-cli-partial\data\recomposed_projects\deepseek-coder-33b-instruct\body\commons-cli\src\test\org\apache\commons\cli\ValuesTest.py", line 160, in setUp self.__cmd = parser.parse0(options, args) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\Users\mriga\OneDrive\Desktop\commons-cli-partial\data\recomposed_projects\deepseek-coder-33b-instruct\body\commons-cli\src\main\org\apache\commons\cli\Parser.py", line 194, in parse0 return self.parse3(options, arguments, None, False) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\Users\mriga\OneDrive\Desktop\commons-cli-partial\data\recomposed_projects\deepseek-coder-33b-instruct\body\commons-cli\src\main\org\apache\commons\cli\Parser.py", line 129, in parse3 tokenList = self._flatten(options, arguments, stopAtNonOption) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\Users\mriga\OneDrive\Desktop\commons-cli-partial\data\recomposed_projects\deepseek-coder-33b-instruct\body\commons-cli\src\main\org\apache\commons\cli\PosixParser.py", line 64, in _flatten elif options.getMatchingOptions(token): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\Users\mriga\OneDrive\Desktop\commons-cli-partial\data\recomposed_projects\deepseek-coder-33b-instruct\body\commons-cli\src\main\org\apache\commons\cli\Options.py", line 85, in getMatchingOptions if longOpt.startswith(opt): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'startswith'
